input: Show me all customers who signed up in the last 30 days and have made at least one purchase
schema: Tables: customers (id, name, email, signup_date), orders (id, customer_id, total, created_at)
expected_sql: SELECT c.* FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE c.signup_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.email, c.signup_date

input: What is the average order value per country, sorted from highest to lowest?
schema: Tables: orders (id, customer_id, total, created_at), customers (id, name, email, country)
expected_sql: SELECT c.country, AVG(o.total) as avg_order_value FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

input: Find the top 5 products by revenue in the last quarter
schema: Tables: products (id, name, price, category), order_items (id, order_id, product_id, quantity), orders (id, total, created_at)
expected_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) as revenue FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months' AND o.created_at < DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

input: List employees who have not submitted any expense reports this year
schema: Tables: employees (id, name, department, hire_date), expense_reports (id, employee_id, amount, submitted_at)
expected_sql: SELECT e.* FROM employees e LEFT JOIN expense_reports er ON e.id = er.employee_id AND er.submitted_at >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) WHERE er.id IS NULL

input: Calculate the month-over-month growth rate of new user signups
expected_sql: SELECT month, signups, LAG(signups) OVER (ORDER BY month) as prev_month, ROUND((signups - LAG(signups) OVER (ORDER BY month))::numeric / LAG(signups) OVER (ORDER BY month) * 100, 2) as growth_rate FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as signups FROM users GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)) sub ORDER BY month
